name: clip_id
description: Unique identifier for this clip, formatted as {video_id}_{ordinal:03d} (e.g., 'abc123XYZ_001'). Primary key.

name: video_id
description: Parent video identifier. Foreign key to videos.video_id.

name: clip_start_time
description: Clip start as a seconds offset into the video. First clip always starts at 0.

name: clip_end_time
description: Clip end as a seconds offset into the video. Last clip truncates to actual video duration.

name: materialized_at
description: Timestamp when this manifest row was written. Auto-populated on insert via DEFAULT.
